news.t: TrueShares Adds a Dynamic Hedge and Recovery Strategy to its ETF Lineup with Launch of ONEH

overview.description: The TrueShares Equity Hedge ETF (ONEH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF seeking to profit from equity market declines and subsequent recoveries through an options strategy. It further generates income through fixed income securities and option spreads. ONEH was launched on Jan 28, 2026 and is issued by Truemark Group.

data.title: TrueShares Adds a Dynamic Hedge and Recovery Strategy to its ETF Lineup with Launch of ONEH
data.text: Not “just” a hedge, actively managed fund's strategy combines “always on” puts and tactical calls to hedge against, and potentially capitalize on, market drawdowns alongside a tactical recovery overla...
